name: SCM22-IRF
scope: Engineering survey and topographic mapping for railway applications.
area: United Kingdom (UK) - on or related to the Scottish central mainline rail route from Motherwell through Perth and Pitlochry to Inverness.
remarks: Intermediate CRS created in 2022 to assist the emulation of the ETRS89 / SCM22 SnakeGrid projected CRS through transformation ETRS89-GBR [OSNet v2009] to SCM22-IRF (1) (code 9969) used in conjunction with the SCM22-TM map projection (code 9971).
